title: Support-readable route-feel phase
summary: Lane 4 should make the new support-shaped route win easier to feel at a glance by pairing one tiny player-facing cue with the protected inspect-target seam, using only Thaw Window and Held Sand as proof routes.

execution_order.why_now: The gameplay win exists already; the next move is to make it legible and durable.

execution_order.goal: Implement the cue plus seam-backed route-feel pass.
execution_order.why_now: One coherent wave is better than another stack of route-specific tweaks.

execution_order.goal: Review whether support choice is now easier to feel in motion.
execution_order.why_now: The pass only matters if it stays tiny, readable, and maintainable.

guardrails: Do not add a new support HUD, planner shell, or notebook surface.
Touch only Thaw Window and Held Sand for the live proof routes.
If the cue needs more than one line or one tiny icon state, it is too big.

main_298_focus.preferred_seam: existing top-right NOTEBOOK J field-request hint chip
main_298_focus.activation_rule: show the support-readable state only when hand-lens is actively changing the live nearest inspect target for the current route slot
proof_plan: Thaw Window hand-lens shelf shows the cue when woolly-lousewort is the live preferred target
Held Sand hand-lens shelf shows the cue when beach-grass is the live preferred target
the same shelves stay on the plain existing hint state for note-tabs
avoid: touching routes beyond Thaw Window and Held Sand
